positive: A stylized, geometric portrait of a glowing, ethereal woodland creature (like a fox or cervus), rendered in clean silhouettes and vibrant jewel tones. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered on the creature which is surrounded by abstract, intertwining natural elements like glowing vines, geometric leaves, and stylized moons. The style should be a blend of Art Deco opulence and Japanese Ukiyo-e nature motifs, giving it a modern, mystical feel. Use a strong, contrasting background of deep indigo and teal blue, allowing the glowing subject and foreground elements to pop with golden and emerald highlights. Print-ready, vector quality illustration, high contrast, symmetrical composition, minimalist background elements, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, cropped, artifacts, noisy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, disfigured, low resolution, low detail, noise
